title: cachearchitecture
content:
# cachearchitecturedocument ## Redisclusterredis-cluster-01
- ：Redis 7.2
- ：Cluster，33
- maxmemory：4GB/node
- strategy：allkeys-lru
- ：>= 85%
- keystandards： - user-session:* TTL=1h - product-catalog:* TTL=1h - order-cache:* TTL=30min ## CDNcache
- ：CDN
- cachestrategy：URLpath+parameterhashcachekey
- ：>= 90%
- alertthreshold：> 500Mbps
- URLstandards：contenthashcontentcache ## cacheCaffeine
- order-service: maximumSize=10000, expireAfterWrite=5min
- ：>= 80% ## MySQL Query Cache
- query_cache_size=256MB
- ：>= 60%
- note：DDLdatabaserecommendationenabledquery_cache
author: Architecture Team
